title: gothofreda subhirtella
intro: Gothofreda subhirtella is a plant species that belongs to the genus Gothofreda and family Araliaceae, commonly known as the ivy tree or houttuynia. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Gothofreda subhirtella can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for various health benefits, including reducing fever and promoting digestion.
